title: Panchshil Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Panchshil Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Panchshil Realty has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Panchshil Realty:
Panchshil Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
